messages.content: write an ad script for Ariel liquid. Recommended : Consumer Tension, followed by  RTB Benefit and Hence #1 brand recco by Washing Machine makers. The RTBs to cover aren liquid 4x soluble stain hunters where you can remove tough stains in 1 wash even in quick wash cycle and 5 cleaning ingredients designed for your Washing Machine helps you remove tough stain in 1 wash.

Are you tired of stubborn stains ruining your favorite clothes? Are you frustrated with having to wash multiple times just to get rid of them? Then, Ariel liquid is here to take care of your worries!

With Ariel liquid, you don't have to worry about stains anymore. Our 4x soluble stain hunters are guaranteed to remove tough stains in just one wash, even in the quick wash cycle! That means you can save time and water by washing your dirty clothes in one go.

What's more, our liquid detergent contains 5 cleaning ingredients that are specially designed for your washing machine. So, not only does Ariel liquid help you remove tough stains, but it also helps your machine perform better and last longer!

And, it's no wonder that Ariel liquid is the number one brand recommended by washing machine makers. Our RTBs prove that we stand out from the rest with our superior stain-fighting formula, efficient cleaning ingredients, and lasting machine protection.

Say goodbye to stubborn stains and hello to cleaner clothes with Ariel liquid.
make it more fun and engaging. use props.

Are you ready to tackle those tough stains with Ariel liquid? Get ready to join in on the fun with our stain-busting prop party!

First up, we've got our 4x soluble stain hunters - these bad boys are strong enough to remove the toughest of stains in just one wash! *cue superhero music and a cape-waving prop*

But wait, there's more! Our liquid detergent also contains 5 cleaning ingredients that are specially designed for your washing machine. Keep your machine running smoothly while you say goodbye to those pesky stains. *bring in a mini washing machine prop*

And of course, it's no surprise that Ariel liquid is the number one brand recommended by washing machine makers. We're the OG of stain-fighting, folks! *bring out a "Best Stain-Fighter" award prop*

So say goodbye to stress and hello to clean clothes with Ariel liquid. Grab your superhero cape, mini washing machine, and best stain-fighter award and join the party!
make it more engaging and believable.

Let's get real, nobody likes to deal with stains on their clothes. It's frustrating and time-consuming. But fear not, because we've got the solution for you.

Introducing Ariel liquid - the go-to detergent for tough stains. We know you've tried other brands, but rest assured that Ariel liquid is the #1 recommended brand by washing machine makers. Don't just take our word for it, try it for yourself and see the difference.

Our 4x soluble stain hunters are the real deal. They penetrate deep into the fabric and remove the stains in just one wash. No more washing the same item over and over again. And, with 5 unique cleaning ingredients, Ariel liquid helps keep your washing machine in tip-top shape, so you can continue to use it for years to come.

We understand that you need to see it to believe it, and that's why we're confident enough to offer you a money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with the results, we'll give you your money back. It's that simple!

Say goodbye to the frustration of dealing with stains and hello to the simplicity of Ariel liquid. Try it out for yourself and trust us, you won't regret it.
use two kids to have this conversation. change the setting to a supermarket.

[Setting: A supermarket aisle. Two kids, Tom and Emily, are standing in front of a shelf of detergents.]

Tom: Ugh, I hate it when I spill food on my clothes. Mom always gets so mad when I ruin a shirt.

Emily: I know, right? But my mom uses Ariel liquid for all our clothes. It's amazing at getting rid of stains!

Tom: Really? I've never heard of it. What's so great about it?

Emily: Well, for starters, it's the #1 recommended brand by washing machine makers. And, it has this awesome 4x soluble stain hunters that remove even the toughest of stains in just one wash! 

Tom: That sounds too good to be true. 

Emily: I thought so too, but my mom swears by it. And, it's not just for stains! Ariel liquid has 5 cleaning ingredients that are designed for your washing machine, so it helps keep your machine running smoothly.

Tom: Hmm, I gotta give this a try. 

[The kids look around and spot an Ariel liquid bottle on the shelf.]

Tom: Oh, here it is! 

Emily: We should show our moms the bottle and tell them we want to try Ariel liquid. 

Tom: Good idea, let's do it! 

[The kids excitedly run off with the Ariel liquid bottle in hand.]

Voiceover: Don't let stains ruin your day. Try Ariel liquid, the #1 recommended brand by washing machine makers. Its 4x soluble stain hunters and 5 cleaning ingredients are guaranteed to leave your clothes spotless. Find Ariel liquid at your nearest supermarket today.
use the washing machine makers in the script.

[Setting: A supermarket aisle. Two kids, Tom and Emily, are standing in front of a shelf of detergents.]

Tom: Ugh, I hate it when I spill food on my clothes. Mom always gets so mad when I ruin a shirt.

Emily: I know, right? But my mom uses Ariel liquid for all our clothes. It's amazing at getting rid of stains!

Tom: Really? I've never heard of it. What's so great about it?

Emily: Well, for starters, it's the #1 recommended brand by washing machine makers. And, it has this awesome 4x soluble stain hunters that remove even the toughest of stains in just one wash!

write a new script for Ariel liquid. keep the lab coat expert as the main protagonist.

[Setting: A laboratory. A lab coat expert is holding a shirt with a stubborn stain on it.]

Lab Coat Expert: Stains can be tough to remove, but with Ariel liquid, it's no problem! 

[The expert holds up a bottle of Ariel liquid and points to its 4x soluble stain hunters.]

Lab Coat Expert: These stain hunters are powerful enough to penetrate deep into the fabric and remove the toughest of stains in just one wash! 

[The expert then holds up a small container of the 5 cleaning ingredients.]

Lab Coat Expert: And, it's not just about the stain removal. Ariel liquid also contains 5 cleaning ingredients that are designed to work together with your washing machine to provide a thorough cleaning cycle.

[The expert walks over to a washing machine and adds Ariel liquid to a load of clothes. The machine starts to wash the clothes.]

Lab Coat Expert: You see, washing your clothes with Ariel liquid not only removes tough stains but also helps maintain the longevity of your washing machine.

[A timer goes off, indicating the end of the wash cycle.]

Lab Coat Expert: And there you have it, beautifully clean clothes that not only look great but also smell amazing! 

Voiceover: Discover the power of Ariel liquid and its stain hunters and cleaning ingredients that will help keep your clothes and your washing machine looking and smelling fresher for longer. Try it out today!
